steps.title: Identify the constant term as the y-intercept
steps.content: In the linear function $f(t) = 14t + 9$, the constant 9 is the y-intercept. This represents the output value when the input equals zero. Since $t$ measures months after purchase, $t = 0$ is the purchase moment.

steps.title: Evaluate the function at t = 0
steps.content: Substitute $t = 0$ into the function: $$f(0) = 14(0) + 9 = 9$$ The plant was 9 inches long at the moment Tavon purchased it. That matches choice D — D is correct.
